records.question: Which aircraft is the Robinson R-22 with max disk loading exactly 2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²), described as a Light utility helicopter, and containing 497 ft² (46.2 m²) total disk area and 370 lb (635 kg) max gross weight?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aircraft_id FROM aircraft
JOIN airport_aircraft ON aircraft.aircraft_id = airport_aircraft.aircraft_id
WHERE aircraft.max_disk_loading = '2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²)' AND aircraft.description = 'Light utility helicopter' AND aircraft.total_disk_area LIKE '%497 ft² (46.2 m²)%' AND aircraft.max_gross_weight LIKE '%370 lb (635 kg)%' AND aircraft.aircraft = 'Robinson R-22'
records.pred_sql: SELECT "Aircraft_ID" FROM aircraft WHERE "Aircraft" = 'Robinson R-22' AND "Max_disk_Loading" = '2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²)' AND "Description" = 'Light utility helicopter' AND "Total_disk_area" = '497 ft² (46.2 m²)' AND "Max_Gross_Weight" = '370 lb (635 kg)'

records.question: Which aircraft is the CH-47D Chinook described as a Tandem rotor helicopter, with max disk loading exactly 8.8 lb/ft² (43 kg/m²), max gross weight containing 50, and total disk area containing 655 ft² (526 m²)?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aircraft_id FROM aircraft
WHERE aircraft.max_disk_loading = '8.8 lb/ft² (43 kg/m²)' AND aircraft.max_gross_weight LIKE '%50%' AND aircraft.aircraft = 'CH-47D Chinook' AND aircraft.description = 'Tandem rotor helicopter' AND aircraft.total_disk_area LIKE '%655 ft² (526 m²)%'
records.pred_sql: SELECT "Aircraft_ID" FROM aircraft WHERE "Aircraft" = 'CH-47D Chinook' AND "Description" = 'Tandem rotor helicopter' AND "Max_disk_Loading" = '8.8 lb/ft² (43 kg/m²)' AND "Max_Gross_Weight" LIKE '%50%' AND "Total_disk_area" LIKE '%655 ft² (526 m²)%'

records.question: Which aircraft have a max disk loading of 8.8 lb/ft² (43 kg/m²) and operate at airports where transit passengers is exactly 38458.0 and domestic passengers is at most 1171605.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aircraft_id FROM aircraft
JOIN airport_aircraft ON aircraft.aircraft_id = airport_aircraft.aircraft_id
JOIN airport ON airport_aircraft.airport_id = airport.airport_id
WHERE airport.transit_passengers = 38458.0 AND airport.domestic_passengers <= 1171605.0 AND aircraft.max_disk_loading = '8.8 lb/ft² (43 kg/m²)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a."Aircraft_ID"
FROM aircraft a
JOIN airport_aircraft aa ON a."Aircraft_ID" = aa."Aircraft_ID"
JOIN airport ap ON aa."Airport_ID" = ap."Airport_ID"
WHERE a."Max_disk_Loading" = '8.8 lb/ft² (43 kg/m²)'
AND ap."Transit_Passengers" = 38458.0
AND ap."Domestic_Passengers" <= 1171605.0

records.question: Which aircraft exactly described as Light utility helicopter and with max disk loading of 2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²) are Robinson R-22 and operate at airports where international passengers is 30431051.0, total passengers is 34205887.0, aircraft movements is at least 263653.0, freight metric tonnes is at least 107702.0, and domestic passengers is at least 3730963.0?

SELECT aircraft.aircraft_id FROM aircraft

JOIN airport ON airport_aircraft.airport_id = airport.airport_id

SELECT DISTINCT a."Aircraft_ID"
FROM aircraft a
JOIN airport_aircraft aa ON a."Aircraft_ID" = aa."Aircraft_ID"
JOIN airport ap ON aa."Airport_ID" = ap."Airport_ID"
WHERE a."Description" = 'Light utility helicopter'
AND a."Max_disk_Loading" = '2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²)'
AND a."Aircraft" = 'Robinson R-22'
AND ap."International_Passengers" = 30431051.0
AND ap."Total_Passengers" = 34205887.0
AND ap."Aircraft_Movements" >= 263653.0
AND ap."Freight_Metric_Tonnes" >= 107702.0

records.question: Which aircraft are associated with airports that have no more than 6267114 total passengers and exactly 5057051 international passengers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aircraft_id FROM aircraft
JOIN airport_aircraft ON aircraft.aircraft_id = airport_aircraft.aircraft_id
JOIN airport ON airport_aircraft.airport_id = airport.airport_id
WHERE airport.total_passengers <= 6267114.0 AND airport.international_passengers = 5057051.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a."Aircraft_ID"
FROM aircraft a
INNER JOIN airport_aircraft aa ON a."Aircraft_ID" = aa."Aircraft_ID"
INNER JOIN airport ap ON aa."Airport_ID" = ap."Airport_ID"
WHERE ap."Total_Passengers" <= 6267114
AND ap."International_Passengers" = 5057051
